summary: School management PWA app with multi-role authentication (Admin/Teacher) for managing students, fees, attendance, and teachers, with offline capabilities and installable app experience
architectural_notes: Google and email authentication for admin signup
Progressive Web App (PWA) implementation with service worker
Offline caching for previously loaded data
Installable app experience with web manifest
Activity audit log system tracking user actions with timestamps and actor attribution

existing_features.title: Replace all instances of 'S.K Ideal Coaching Centre' with 'School Mitra' in the header, title, manifest, and throughout the application
Implement a login interface with separate flows for Admin and Teacher roles, allowing users to authenticate with login ID and password
Add Google and email authentication options for Admin signup and login
Implement Admin functionality to add teachers with unique login IDs and passwords that Admin sets during teacher creation
Restrict Teacher role permissions to only edit fee records, add students, and delete students
Grant Admin role all Teacher permissions plus ability to manage teachers, edit all records, and manage attendance
Add attendance management functionality accessible to Admin role for marking and viewing student attendance
Verify and test that all role-based permissions work correctly with no unauthorized access between Admin and Teacher roles
Diagnose and fix the 'Failed to load data' error that is currently preventing data from loading in the application
Update the footer component to display 'School Mitra' instead of 'S.K Ideal Coaching Centre'

Audit and replace all remaining instances of 'S.K Ideal Coaching Centre' with 'School Mitra' throughout the entire application, including but not limited to: HTML title tags, meta descriptions, any hardcoded strings in components, configuration files, and any other locations where the old name appears

Investigate and fix the 'Failed to load data' error that is preventing data from loading in the application, checking for issues in API calls, actor initialization, authentication state, query hooks configuration, and error boundaries
Review and fix all React Query hooks in useQueries.ts to ensure proper error handling, retry logic, and loading state management for all data fetching operations
Add comprehensive error logging and debugging information to identify the root cause of data loading failures, including console errors, network request details, and authentication state
Test the complete authentication flow for both Admin (Internet Identity) and Teacher (username/password) roles to ensure proper initialization and data access after login
Remove the 'remove this' text that is currently displayed in the header component
Diagnose and fix the 'failed to load dashboard data' error that is preventing the dashboard from displaying data properly
Implement Progressive Web App (PWA) functionality including service worker registration, offline caching strategy for static assets and API responses, and cache management for optimal performance
Create and configure web app manifest (manifest.json) with School Mitra branding, app name, description, theme colors, background color, display mode set to 'standalone', and start URL
Generate and configure PWA app icons in multiple sizes (192x192, 512x512) for installation on various devices, and create a favicon for browser tab display
Add PWA install prompt component that detects when the app can be installed, displays a user-friendly install button or banner, handles the beforeinstallprompt event, and can be dismissed by the user
Configure splash screen for PWA with School Mitra branding including app icon, name, and background color that displays during app launch on mobile devices
Implement offline fallback page that displays when users navigate to uncached pages while offline, with clear messaging about offline status and instructions to reconnect
Add meta tags to index.html for PWA support including viewport settings, theme-color for browser UI, apple-touch-icon for iOS devices, and mobile-web-app-capable tags

Test and verify that all existing School Mitra features (student management, fee tracking, attendance, teacher management, role-based authentication) work correctly in PWA mode both online and offline with cached data
Implement fee deletion functionality allowing both Teachers and Admins to delete fee records with a confirmation dialog before deletion
Add Activity Log section to Admin dashboard displaying all tracked actions with timestamps, teacher usernames, action types, and relevant details in a sortable table format
Update Footer component to replace current text with 'Built And Managed By TixtedEdits' displayed in elegant cursive font style using Pacifico or similar cursive font family
Replace the Pacifico cursive font in the Footer component with a modern, clean font family (such as Inter, Poppins, or Montserrat) while keeping the text 'Built And Managed By TixtedEdits' unchanged
Remove or update the Pacifico font import from frontend/index.html if it is no longer used elsewhere in the application after the footer font change

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement login interface with Admin and Teacher roles
Admin can add/manage teachers and set their login credentials
Teachers can edit fee records, add/delete students
Admin has all teacher permissions plus teacher management
Add attendance management feature for both roles
Admin sign up with Google or email authentication
Verify that the backend actor is properly initialized and accessible, checking the canister deployment status, actor factory configuration, and authentication flow integration
Convert to Progressive Web App (PWA) with service worker, web manifest, and offline caching
Make app installable on desktop and mobile devices with custom icon and splash screen
Implement offline viewing of previously loaded data
Enable Teachers and Admins to delete fee records with confirmation dialogs
Implement Activity Audit Log for Admin to track all actions (student/fee/attendance/teacher changes) with timestamps showing which teacher performed each action

Create Activity Audit Log feature in the backend to track all key actions including student additions/deletions, fee edits/deletions, attendance changes, and teacher additions with timestamps and the teacher who performed each action
